name: api-traffic-intelligence-platform
description: Real-Time API Traffic Intelligence and Abnormal Usage Detection System

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix traffic-simulator
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --names "SERVER,CLIENT" "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix client"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --names "SERVER,CLIENT" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix client"
